mnemonics.title: MIN_MAX_NORM
mnemonics.content: Most Important Numbers Make Nice Threads - MIN (1), MAX (10), NORM (5)

mnemonics.title: PRIO CPU
mnemonics.content: Priorities Rule In Ordering CPU Usage - Higher priority threads get more CPU time

mnemonics.title: THREAD SCHED
mnemonics.content: Threads Have Relative Execution Algorithm Depending Heavily On System Configuration, Hardware, Environment, and Deployment
